scenes.description: Bijou fights Shadow Bijou while singing Weight of the World.
Bijou defeats the Shadow and receives a reward, then delivers a final blow.
Bijou announces her new original song in an MC segment.
Bijou performs her new original song, ROCK IN!.

subtitles.original: Cause we're gonna shout it loud
subtitles.english: Cause we're gonna shout it loud

subtitles.original: Even if our words seem meaningless
subtitles.english: Even if our words seem meaningless

subtitles.original: It's like I'm carrying the weight of the world
subtitles.english: It's like I'm carrying the weight of the world

subtitles.original: そう僕らは今
subtitles.english: Yes, we are now

subtitles.original: あぁ無意味でも願う
subtitles.english: Ah, even if it's meaningless, I pray

subtitles.original: ただ君との未来を
subtitles.english: Only for a future with you

subtitles.original: Still, we're gonna shout it loud
subtitles.english: Still, we're gonna shout it loud

subtitles.original: Even if our words seem meaningless

subtitles.original: It's like I'm carrying the weight of the world
subtitles.english: It's like I'm carrying the weight of the world

subtitles.original: そう僕らは今
subtitles.english: Yes, we are now

subtitles.original: I hope that someday,
subtitles.english: I hope that someday,

subtitles.original: あぁ無意味でも願う
subtitles.english: Ah, even if it's meaningless, I pray

subtitles.original: That I could save every one of us
subtitles.english: That I could save every one of us

subtitles.original: ただ君との時間を
subtitles.english: Only for a time with you

subtitles.original: 祈り歌を　得られずとも
subtitles.english: Even if my prayer song is never heard

subtitles.original: My dreams will come to life
subtitles.english: My dreams will come to life

subtitles.original: 僕は
Impressive.
subtitles.english: Impressive.

subtitles.original: Yes! The coin!
subtitles.english: Yes! The coin!

subtitles.original: Oh, you're still alive. Oh.
subtitles.english: Oh, you're still alive. Oh.

subtitles.original: You, who have defeated all the game masters, shall be rewarded.
subtitles.english: You, who have defeated all the game masters, shall be rewarded.

subtitles.original: Huh? What... what is this?
subtitles.english: Huh? What... what is this?

subtitles.original: Now, show this to everyone.
subtitles.english: Now, show this to everyone.

subtitles.original: Yeah! Hey thanks, but...
subtitles.english: Yeah! Hey thanks, but...

subtitles.original: ...there can only be one! Hah!
subtitles.english: ...there can only be one! Hah!

subtitles.original: Hello everyone! We have made it to the final stage!
subtitles.english: Hello everyone! We have made it to the final stage!

subtitles.original: You didn't think I collected all those coins and played all those games for nothing, did you?
subtitles.english: You didn't think I collected all those coins and played all those games for nothing, did you?

subtitles.original: No, because I'm cashing it in with all of these coins we have unlocked...
subtitles.english: No, because I'm cashing it in with all of these coins we have unlocked...

subtitles.original: ...my new original song! Woohoo!
subtitles.english: ...my new original song! Woohoo!

subtitles.original: And guess what? The video's gonna come out right after this. Good job everyone!
subtitles.english: And guess what? The video's gonna come out right after this. Good job everyone!

subtitles.original: And I'm gonna perform it to you right now! Are you ready?
subtitles.english: And I'm gonna perform it to you right now! Are you ready?

subtitles.original: Let's go out with a bang! ROCKIN!
subtitles.english: Let's go out with a bang! ROCKIN!

subtitles.original: Bibou's here to play
subtitles.english: Bibou's here to play

subtitles.original: Yeah, uh-huh
subtitles.english: Yeah, uh-huh

subtitles.original: Uh, uh
subtitles.english: Uh, uh

subtitles.original: Woke up in the morning
subtitles.english: Woke up in the morning

subtitles.original: I had a funny dream
subtitles.english: I had a funny dream

subtitles.original: I was a stone that had been thrown
subtitles.english: I was a stone that had been thrown

subtitles.english: No way back, I was all in

subtitles.original: What if that was me soaring straight to the top?
subtitles.english: What if that was me soaring straight to the top?

subtitles.original: Let's take a chance, game on, and shoot my shot
subtitles.english: Let's take a chance, game on, and shoot my shot

subtitles.original: Log in, get good, you mad?
subtitles.english: Log in, get good, you mad?

subtitles.original: Let's go talk beep, get hit,
subtitles.english: Let's go talk beep, get hit,

subtitles.original: clean sweep
subtitles.english: clean sweep

subtitles.original: Now you know what's up, hit 'em with a 1-2-3 Bibou-Bibou
subtitles.english: Now you know what's up, hit 'em with a 1-2-3 Bibou-Bibou

subtitles.original: Come and test your luck, yeah we comin' in clutch Bibou-Bibou
subtitles.english: Come and test your luck, yeah we comin' in clutch Bibou-Bibou

subtitles.original: Skipping stone in flight, take 'em out one-shot Bibou-Bibou
subtitles.english: Skipping stone in flight, take 'em out one-shot Bibou-Bibou

subtitles.original: Come and help me fight, get on up, let's go, just me and you
subtitles.english: Come and help me fight, get on up, let's go, just me and you

subtitles.original: Player one and player two
subtitles.english: Player one and player two

subtitles.original: We'll see this through
subtitles.english: We'll see this through

subtitles.original: Close my eyes, make a wish
subtitles.english: Close my eyes, make a wish

subtitles.original: One more shot, I will not miss! ROCKIN!
subtitles.english: One more shot, I will not miss! ROCKIN!

subtitles.english: Bububa bubububa bububa bambam ba

subtitles.english: Level up we go onwards

subtitles.english: Aiming for another win

subtitles.original: A diamond in the rough, it's kinda tough
subtitles.english: A diamond in the rough, it's kinda tough

subtitles.original: You gotta keep on rollin'
subtitles.english: You gotta keep on rollin'

subtitles.original: The grind goes on and on, no breaks

subtitles.english: Seal the cracks with a few Band-Aids
